_publications._publicationTitle: Quality of life in individuals with neurofibromatosis type 1 associated cutaneous neurofibromas: validation of the Dutch cNF-Skindex.

_contextSnippet: The total and subdomain scores of the cNF-Skindex score also correlated significantly with several of the SF-36 scales
details: Total and subdomain scores of cNF-Skindex correlated significantly with several SF-36 scales, supporting convergent validity
